creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
One thing annoyed me about this restaurant 👇

So, we went there on a Saturday and paid 750 DKK (around €100/$108) which is cool, but we also paid 500 DKK (€67/$72) for our non-alcoholic juice menu which is the same as the wine menu 😅 

The juice was lovely, but still I think it’s a bit wild that it’s the same price as a wine menu 🧐

It didn’t ruin the dinner experience at all though - I still fully recommend this restaurant and I’m sure I’ll be back, probably on a weekday though 🤠

📍Restaurant Resumè in Svendborg

Svendborg is such a cool little town, by the way. Definitely one of my favourite places to go in Denmark - I’ve just posted a video about Svendborg over on my Youtube channel if you want to see more about this little Danish seaside town 🇩🇰

#denmarktravel #restaurantreview #svendborg #traveltips

transcription.text: Let's try a fine dining restaurant in a former church. Today I'm visiting this lovely Danish seaside town where I found this restaurant that had incredible reviews. It's a bloody beautiful place, probably one of the best looking restaurants I've been to here in Denmark. The food was great and if you go there on a weekday you can get a four course meal including a wine menu for just 750 kroner, which is a bit insane here in Scandinavia where everything is so bloody expensive.
